description: Expanded URS library for Pre-vacuum Steam Sterilizer V-model qualification. Seeded from example extraction content and structured for scalable reuse.

requirements.title: Validated pre-vacuum sterilization use
requirements.statement: Equipment shall sterilize defined load families using validated pre-vacuum steam cycles.

requirements.title: Critical process parameter control
requirements.statement: System shall control and record temperature, pressure, and exposure time within validated limits.

requirements.title: Worst-case load capability
requirements.statement: System shall demonstrate compliant sterilization performance for worst-case and representative loads.

requirements.title: Steam and utility suitability
requirements.statement: System shall operate with qualified steam, power, and air/utilities per supplier and site specification.

requirements.title: Safety interlocks and emergency controls
requirements.statement: Door interlocks and emergency stop controls shall prevent unsafe operation and be testable.

requirements.title: Sensor calibration traceability
requirements.statement: Temperature and pressure sensors shall have current NIST-traceable calibration certificates.

requirements.title: Electronic records and audit trail
requirements.statement: When HMI/e-records are used for release, records shall be complete, attributable, and audit-trailed.

requirements.title: Cycle data export and print parity
requirements.statement: Exported cycle files and printed reports shall contain required fields and match for key release data.

requirements.title: Backup and restore capability
requirements.statement: System shall support backup and restore of release-relevant records with verified integrity.

requirements.title: Biological indicator program
requirements.statement: Process shall support BI-based verification and incubation record traceability for validation/PQ.

requirements.title: Air removal verification
requirements.statement: System shall support Bowie-Dick or equivalent air removal verification for pre-vacuum cycles.

requirements.title: Temperature mapping support
requirements.statement: System shall support chamber mapping workflow with thermocouple location traceability.

requirements.title: Supplier and installation documentation
requirements.statement: FAT/SAT, manuals, spare parts list, and installation records shall be available and traceable.

requirements.title: Operator training and qualification records
requirements.statement: Training records shall exist for operation, loading pattern control, and release workflow responsibilities.

requirements.title: Throughput and scheduling
requirements.statement: Equipment shall support planned cycle volume without degrading validated process control.
